basic_details.job_title: VNSGU Associate Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (VNSGU) Recruitment 2026: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University has released the official notification for 1 Associate Professor posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in the relevant field and First class or equivalent at either Bachelor’s or Master’s level in the relevant branch, At least total 6 research publications in SCI journals / UGC / AICTE approved list of journals, Minimum of 8 years of experience in teaching / research / industry out of which at least 2 years shall be Post Ph.D. experience
qualification.details: Ph.D. degree in the relevant field. First class or equivalent at either Bachelor’s or Master’s level in the relevant branch. At least a total of 6 research publications in SCI journals / UGC / AICTE approved list of journals. Minimum of 8 years of experience in teaching / research / industry, out of which at least 2 years shall be Post Ph.D. experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VNSGU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
